Robotics Case

End-Effector Mounting Base for a Robotics Project

end-effector mounting / positioning / repeat operation

IndustriesRobotics
Part Functionend-effector mounting / positioning / repeat operation
Manufacturing CapabilitiesCNC machining, precision hole control, lightweight structure and assembly inspection

Project Scenario

The end-effector mounting base needed reliable positioning features and enough stiffness for repeated robot operating cycles.

Manufacturing Plan

01Part Function ReviewConfirm assembly position, load conditions, operating environment and validation goals.
02Process and Material MatchingMatch process, material, tolerance, surface and batch requirements before production.
03Inspection and DeliveryPrepare delivery records around critical dimensions, appearance and assembly feedback.

Delivery Result

The machined base gave the automation team a stable mounting reference for gripper and tool-change verification.
